message:
test(ssh): expand from 11 to 101 tests for SSH crate (wa-26e9a)

Add comprehensive unit tests across all testable SSH crate modules:
- sftp/types.rs: 33 tests for FileType, FilePermissions, Metadata, OpenOptions
- sftp/error.rs: 35 tests for SftpError enum, TryFrom, error codes, Display
- host.rs: 8 tests for HostVerificationFailed, HostVerificationEvent
- config.rs: 19 tests for wildcard_to_pattern, Pattern matching, Config parsing
- config crate: rustfmt formatting fixes for font.rs, keys.rs, units.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
